Portfolio

Work I'm proud of.

Community events, graphic design, and web work — for brands across Oregon.

Event Promotion

Social media, flyers & on-the-ground support

Community Choir Song Soiree

Designed the event flyer, handled social media promotion, and showed up on the day to help facilitate. A full afternoon of community song at the Eugene Garden Club — joyful, warm, and exactly the kind of thing worth making space for.

Nori Noir — Deep Sea Mystery Dinner Theater

Three nights of deep sea mystery, vegan sushi, and whodunit chaos — and I got to help build the hype. Wrote captions, shared rehearsal content, and created countdown posts that had people actually excited to show up.

Winter Solstice Ceremony of Song

Built the altar — pine, oranges, candles, crystals, handwritten intention cards — and promoted the event across social media. A ceremony for welcoming back the light on the darkest night of the year. One of my favorites.

Graphic Design

Client work — flyers, promotions & social graphics

Breathing4Health — Cathy Holt

Designed a class flyer and Calm Within program materials for Cathy Holt, a breathwork and HeartMath coach. Clean, calming visuals that match the intention of her work — helping people regulate their nervous systems through breath.

Colleen Harmony — @37harmony37

Created a branded reiki flier and a warm thank-you card for Colleen Harmony's healing practice. Earthy, glowing visuals that feel as intentional as the work she does.

Community Folk Choir — Katie Sontag

Ongoing graphic design support for Katie Sontag's Community Folk Choir — event flyers, a giveaway post for the Summer Song Series, and a winter series announcement. All designed to feel as welcoming as the choir itself.

Medicina Campout — Artist Announcements

A series of artist announcement cards for Medicina Campout — a sacred music and earth medicine microfestival in Cascadia. Each card had to hold the same atmospheric energy across different artists while still feeling unique to each one.

Personal Projects

My own brand, events & creative graphics

Personal Brand & Offerings

Graphics I made for my own work — a breakdown of what working with me looks like, a 50% off readings promotion, and an educational piece on intuition for social media.

Arts & Crafts Club — Community Events

Promotional graphics for my cozy arts and crafts club and a few other community events I love — vision boards, painted pots, a fall event schedule, and a Discord birthday tea party that was a lot of fun to design.

Web Design

Sites & link pages built with intention

Web Design · School Project

Black Goose Cantina

A bold, full-page restaurant concept site built for web design class — pink cowgirl energy, fusion street food vibes, and a layout that actually feels like a real brand.
